mapper.insert: INSERT INTO forum_post(user_id, title, content, status, view_count, reply_count, created_at) VALUES(#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, 0, 0, 0, NOW())
mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id as userId, title, LEFT(content,200) as summary, view_count as viewCount, reply_count as replyCount, DATE_FORMAT(created_at,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt FROM forum_post WHERE status = 0
AND (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY is_pinned DESC, created_at DESC

SELECT id, user_id as userId, title, content, view_count as viewCount, reply_count as replyCount, is_pinned as isPinned, is_featured as isFeatured, DATE_FORMAT(created_at,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt FROM forum_post WHERE id = #{id} AND status = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_post SET view_count = view_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_post SET reply_count = reply_count + 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_post SET reply_count = CASE WHEN reply_count > 0 THEN reply_count - 1 ELSE 0 END WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_post SET reply_count = #{replyCount} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
SELECT id, user_id as userId, title, LEFT(content,200) as summary, status, is_pinned as isPinned, is_featured as isFeatured, view_count as viewCount, reply_count as replyCount, DATE_FORMAT(created_at,'%Y-%m-%d %H:%i') as createdAt FROM forum_post
WHERE (title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR content LIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))
ORDER BY is_pinned DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE forum_post SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_post SET is_pinned = #{isPinned} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE forum_post SET is_featured = #{isFeatured} WHERE id = #{id}
